calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Mitchell for Nion McEvoy.

The Court raised the issue of distribution being made without Court order. Mr. Mitchell stated that they worked with Co-Counsel in New York, that Co-Counsel took the lead on administration of the Estate, that there was personal property/distribution of paintings that were gifted to individuals and that the other firm was following customary practices of New York. Mr. Mitchell also stated that he has a declaration certifying that the original certified copy of Debra Brennan's death certificate will be maintained, that it has not been filed, that this was a significant and complicated estate, and that distribution was made before they were aware of it. The First and Final Report of Co-Executors, etc. is taken under submission subject to filing of the declaration. The Court stated that it will look into allowing and not approving the acts of the Administrators. If the declaration is not filed within one week, the matter may have to be restored back on calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
